description.value: Cost: 1 Effect: You use your attack to strike the hand of the target in a way to make them drop a held item. Declare before making roll. Make a normal combat check. Margin 1: if Margin 1 would normally apply damage, then apply base damage. Margin 2: Apply damage as normal for the the Margin of success, and the target drops held item of attackers choice.

system.effect: You use your attack to strike the hand of the target in a way to make them drop a held item. Declare before making roll. Make a normal combat check.
system.special:
Margin 1: if Margin 1 would normally apply damage, then apply base damage.
Margin 2: Apply damage as normal for the the Margin of success, and the target drops held item of attackers choice.
